requirement_topic.en: GRENLEC / PURC Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: GRENLEC / PURC并网——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: GRENLEC / PURC併網——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Grenada solar PV inverter projects are normally reviewed through the local utility and regulatory pathway involving GRENLEC and the Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC), with Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) standards context where applicable. Grenada uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid with UK/IEC legacy practice. Grid-tied inverter submissions should be prepared around IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 photovoltaic grid-interface characteristics, and project-specific protection settings required by GRENLEC or the project engineer. The frequency is the same as China at 50 Hz, but nominal voltage differs: China commonly uses 220/380 V, while Grenada uses 230/400 V.
summary.zh: 格林纳达太阳能光伏逆变器项目通常通过涉及GRENLEC和公共事业监管委员会（PURC）的本地公用事业及监管路径进行审查，并在适用时参考格林纳达标准局（GDBS）标准背景。格林纳达电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，具有英国/IEC传统。并网逆变器提交资料应围绕IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727光伏并网接口特性，以及GRENLEC或项目工程师要求的项目特定保护设置准备。频率与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压不同：中国通常为220/380 V，而格林纳达为230/400 V。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達太陽能光伏逆變器項目通常通過涉及GRENLEC和公共事業監管委員會（PURC）的本地公用事業及監管路徑進行審查，並在適用時參考格瑞那達標準局（GDBS）標準背景。格瑞那達電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，具有英國/IEC傳統。併網逆變器提交資料應圍繞IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727光伏併網介面特性，以及GRENLEC或項目工程師要求的項目特定保護設置準備。頻率與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同：中國通常為220/380 V，而格瑞那達為230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Grenada Public Utilities Regulatory Commission (PURC) — electricity-sector regulatory oversight
Grenada Electricity Services Ltd. (GRENLEC) — utility grid-connection review and project interconnection requirements
Grenada Bureau of Standards (GDBS) — national standards body context

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power-station connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 or the current GB/T 37408 edition used in the certificate file, and domestic anti-islanding or protection-setting test results. These Chinese documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and do not automatically satisfy GRENLEC or PURC review for Grenada. The critical setting issue is voltage: both systems are 50 Hz, but China nominal voltage is 220/380 V and Grenada nominal voltage is 230/400 V.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统要求、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021或证书文件采用的现行GB/T 37408版本，以及国内防孤岛或保护整定测试结果。上述中国文件基于中国电网条件，不能自动满足GRENLEC或PURC对格林纳达项目的审查。关键设置问题是电压：两者均为50 Hz，但中国标称电压为220/380 V，格林纳达标称电压为230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統要求、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021或證書文件採用的現行GB/T 37408版本，以及國內防孤島或保護整定測試結果。上述中國文件基於中國電網條件，不能自動滿足GRENLEC或PURC對格瑞那達項目的審查。關鍵設置問題是電壓：兩者均為50 Hz，但中國標稱電壓為220/380 V，格瑞那達標稱電壓為230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid-connection documents are not a substitute for Grenada project review. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, inverter protection-setting tables, and firmware configuration records for a 230/400 V, 50 Hz GRENLEC grid. Do not present China 220/380 V settings as matching Grenada; the frequency is the same, but the nominal voltage differs and should be retested or revalidated where settings, trip thresholds, or reconnection delays are affected.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不能替代格林纳达项目审查。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727并网接口证据、逆变器保护整定表，以及适用于230/400 V、50 Hz GRENLEC电网的固件配置记录。不得将中国220/380 V设置表述为与格林纳达匹配；频率相同，但标称电压不同，凡设置、跳闸阈值或重连延迟受影响时，应重新测试或重新验证。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不能替代格瑞那達項目審查。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727併網介面證據、逆變器保護整定表，以及適用於230/400 V、50 Hz GRENLEC電網的韌體配置記錄。不得將中國220/380 V設置表述為與格瑞那達匹配；頻率相同，但標稱電壓不同，凡設置、跳脫閾值或重連延遲受影響時，應重新測試或重新驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for GRENLEC grid connection and any PURC-regulated project review where utility interconnection approval is required
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies Chinese grid operator requirements but does not transfer automatically to Grenada GRENLEC or PURC acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Grenada grid connection as a separate GRENLEC/PURC review, not as an extension of Chinese GB/T grid approval. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and validate firmware for Grenada's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid. China and Grenada share 50 Hz frequency, but their nominal voltages differ, so China 220/380 V settings should not be represented as directly matching Grenada requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将格林纳达并网视为独立的GRENLEC/PURC审查，而非中国GB/T并网批准的延伸。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并针对格林纳达230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证固件。中国与格林纳达频率同为50 Hz，但标称电压不同，因此不得将中国220/380 V设置表述为直接匹配格林纳达要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將格瑞那達併網視為獨立的GRENLEC/PURC審查，而非中國GB/T併網批准的延伸。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並針對格瑞那達230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證韌體。中國與格瑞那達頻率同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同，因此不得將中國220/380 V設置表述為直接匹配格瑞那達要求。
